reviews.review_msg: I'd like to point out that this isn't highschool and that the level of attention and critical thinking that she demands is nothing out of the ordinary.I personally thought her classes were fascinating and she has a lot to offer if you pay attention. My papers were all done last minute but I never got less than 8 out of 10.

I'd like to point out that this isn't highschool and that the level of attention and critical thinking that she demands is nothing out of the ordinary.I personally thought her classes were fascinating and she has a lot to offer if you pay attention. My papers were all done last minute but I never got less than 8 out of 10.

I think people's preoccupation with her accent is really a guise for racism.  There is no way you could not understand what she's saying unless you tried really hard not to.  I found her fun and extremely knowledgeable. Her book, Global Shaping is excelle
